/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Werror=format-security -Wextra -Winvalid-pch -fexceptions -Wall -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fomit-frame-pointer -ffast-math -fno-finite-math-only -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/widgets_functiondialogs.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libmuse_widgets_functiondialogs.so -o libmuse_widgets_functiondialogs.so
